text.title: code-review-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for code-review-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Hallucinated bugs: agent flags an NPE on code that already null-checks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Require the agent to cite the exact line and explain the concrete failing input; reject blocking comments that cannot demonstrate the failure.

failure-mode.description: Context truncation: agent reviews files 1-3 fully, rubber-stamps files 4-12 of a large PR.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force the agent to enumerate files reviewed; if it had to skip any, it must refuse to approve and ask for a PR split.

failure-mode.description: Self-review bias: agent reviewing a Claude-authored diff tends to agree with itself.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always require a human review pass after agent review on agent-authored code.
